Unfortunately, it's connected to the UPS via a 3 pin molex connector, making four APAC/USB Power Provider plugs required. The iMac has a 10 watt core i3 CPU, a 500 mAh battery, and 4 GB of HyperReference RAM. The USB/APAC/power plugs go into five plugs on the left side of the iMac using Apple's 22 pin connector.
